LabVantage instance hostname prefix

LabVantage LIMS (Laboratory Information Management System) REST API for sample management, test result recording, instrument integration, and regulatory compliance data exchange. Supports GxP-compliant workflows for pharmaceutical, biotech, and clinical laboratory environments. The LabVantage REST API provides access to samples, tests, results, containers, and laboratory schedules via JSON over HTTPS.
